chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-822 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) Date of Hearing: 11.09.2023 Date of Order: 11.09.2023 Mr. Muhammad Kaleemullah Memon, Advocate for Applicants. Ms. Safa Hisbani, Assistant P.G Sindh. ORDER ARSHAD HUSSAIN KHAN, J.- By this order, I intend to dispose of the above captioned bail application whereby applicants Muhammad Hussain Khan @ Budho, Ghulam Haider, Ghulam Rasool @ Karo, Sadam Hussain, Kandero, Ghulam Murtaza and Ghulam Fareed, who are present on ad-interim bail, seek pre-arrest bail in Crime No.50 of 2023 registered at Police Station Dehi for offences under Sections 147, 148, 149, 506/2, 403, 504 PPC. 2. It is alleged that one of the applicants / accused namely Ghulam Fareed got loan from son of complainant namely Asan and on demand he alongwith co-accused maltreated and threatened him, who received injuries for which F.I.R was lodged. 3. Learned Counsel for the applicants / accused at the very outset submits that both the complainant and victim extend no objection if the applicants are admitted to pre-arrest bail. In order to confirm this fact, the complainant Dino and his son / victim Asan are present in person and states that they have no objection on the confirmation of the interim pre-arrest bail of the applicants / accused. 4. Learned Assistant Prosecutor-General also has no objection on the confirmation of bail before arrest already allowed to the applicants. Accordingly, this bail application is allowed and ad- 2 interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicants / accused is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions as contained in the order dated 03.08.2023.

Learned Assistant Prosecutor-General also has no objection on the confirmation of bail before arrest already allowed to the applicants. Accordingly, this bail application is allowed and ad- 2 interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicants / accused is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions as contained in the order dated 03.08.2023. JUDGE Shahid
